title: Defense drone
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the defense drone|the [[Defense Drone (Sprocket)|Defense Drone]]}}
[[File:DefenseDrone-NEGTD.png|thumb|250px|A defense drone mounted on an [[HMOR homing droid]]]]
[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[homing droid]]s carried on them two '''defense drones''' that they could launch. These barely-[[Sentience programming|sapient]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were kamikaze missiles that attacked a selected target.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 8|''Droids'' (1986) 8]]
